name: Punch
description: Represents a single biometric attendance punch record.

project_id.description: ID of the project this punch belongs to.

attendance_id.description: The HRMS/Attendance ID of the employee.

timestamp_raw.description: The raw timestamp string from the source file (e.g., '01/10/2025 08:30 AM').

import_batch_id.description: The ID of the UploadJob that created this record, used for rollback.

calendar_period_id.description: Legacy batch tag field, preserved for compatibility.
